name: Shenzhen Increase Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Increase Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of power electronic products. It offers automotive charging power, power supply, communication power, industrial power supply, and other products. The company's products are used in automotive, electric power, railways, urban transport, metallurgy, energy, communication, and other industries. Shenzhen Increase Technology Shares Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
